lint.note: 257 lint issues found (217 errors, 40 warnings). Most are auto-generated React Router types (empty object types) and unused variables. Core implementation files have minimal issues.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Average inventory calculation may need refinement for accuracy
PDF export limits rotation report to 20 items without pagination
Query parameter validation could be enhanced with Elysia schemas
Search parameter accepted but not implemented in findByProfileId
daysFilter state not used to refetch trends data
Chart uses simple CSS bars instead of dedicated charting library
newClients hardcoded to 0 in trends with TODO comment
businessType hardcoded to 'beauty' in frontend with TODO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add clarification about using Drizzle relations vs separate repository methods. When a relation is already included in a query (e.g., `with: { businessType: true }`), workers should use the relation data directly rather than calling a separate method.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m8-3-business-dashboard route attempted to call profileRepository.getBusinessType() which doesn't exist, when profile.businessType was already available via the relation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add typecheck commands that work with the current package structure. The current services.yaml references 'typecheck' scripts that don't exist in package.json files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Typecheck validator failed because packages don't have 'typecheck' scripts defined. Should use 'tsc --noEmit' or add the scripts to package.json.
